text.Outra aba assumiu o painel: Another tab took over the dashboard
text.Uma nova aba do Song Request Linux foi a: A new Song Request Linux tab was opened and became active. To avoid duplicate commands, this tab is on standby.
text.Salve a configuração antes de trocar de: Save settings before changing screens, closing the app, or starting the stream.
text.Fila, player, eventos e conexões em uma: Queue, player, events, and connections on one screen.
text.Siga os passos em ordem. Preencha, conec: Follow the steps in order. Fill in the fields, connect accounts, and click Save.
text.Spotify, YouTube via Pear ou YouTube via: Spotify, YouTube via Pear, or YouTube via OBS Browser.
text.Twitch: ligar o bot ao chat: Twitch: connect the bot to chat
text.Use a conta do bot aqui. Ela vai ler o c: Use the bot account here. It reads chat and responds to commands.
text.Obrigatório se o provider padrão for Spo: Required when Spotify is the active mode. Requires Premium and Spotify open on the stream PC.
text.Tocar playlist fallback quando não houve: Play fallback playlist when there are no requests
text.Escolha onde o YouTube vai tocar: OBS Br: Choose where YouTube plays: OBS Browser Source or Pear Desktop.
text.Pear Desktop ou Browser Source OBS. Use: Pear Desktop or OBS Browser Source. Use only one mode at a time.
text.adicione a URL acima como Browser Source: add the URL above as a Browser Source, enable
text.e, nas propriedades avancadas de audio,: and, in Advanced Audio Properties, use
Volume is controlled in the OBS mixer.
and keep the Pear API saved in Setup.
text.Aceitar vídeo fora da categoria Música: Accept videos outside the Music category
text.Escolha se a fila deve continuar depois: Choose whether the queue continues after the stream ends and the app opens again.
text.Continuar com a fila salva quando o app: Restore saved queue when the app opens again
Adds a song to the queue.
text.Sem número mostra o volume. Com número m: Without a number, shows volume. With a number, changes volume.
text.Escolha Spotify, Pear ou OBS Browser. Us: Choose Spotify, Pear, or OBS Browser. Use one provider at a time.
text.Controlar audio via OBS + Monitorar e en: Control audio via OBS + Monitor and Output
text.Ative o plugin API Server na porta 26538: Enable the API Server plugin on port 26538.
text.Song Request Linux encerrando: Song Request Linux is shutting down
text.Busca, fila, volume e fallback pelo Spot: Search, queue, volume, and fallback through Spotify.
text.Busca pelo SRL e playback no Pear Deskto: Search through SRL and playback in Pear Desktop.
text.Busca pelo SRL e playback no Browser Sou: Search through SRL and playback in Browser Source.
text.Escolha um modo por live: Spotify, YouTu: Choose one mode per stream: Spotify, YouTube/Pear, or YouTube/OBS Browser.
text.Persistência: não informada nesta respos: Persistence: not reported in this response.
text.a fila atual não será restaurada ao reab: the current queue will not be restored when reopening the app.
text.bot Twitch sem configuracao ativa: Twitch bot has no active configuration
text.Se quiser continuar por aqui, clique em: To continue here, click Use this tab. The other tab will go on standby.
text.Tentando fechar a aba. Se o navegador bl: Trying to close the tab. If the browser blocks it, you can close it manually.
text.Esta aba pode ser fechada. O painel ativ: This tab can be closed. The active dashboard is in another tab.
text.selecionado. Clique em Salvar configura: selected. Click Save settings to apply it to the stream.
text.Salve para ativar busca, fila, volume e: Save to enable Spotify search, queue, volume, and fallback.
text.Ficará inativo enquanto Spotify for o mo: Will stay inactive while Spotify is the stream mode.
text.Necessária para pedidos por nome; links: Required for name-based requests; direct links also require YouTube mode to be active.
text.Pear Desktop encontrado. Confira se o AP: Pear Desktop found. Check that API Server is active on port 26538.
text.Abra o Pear, faça login no Pear/YouTube: Open Pear, sign in to Pear/YouTube if needed, and enable API Server on port 26538.
text.yt-dlp encontrado. O player /player cons: yt-dlp found. The /player page can resolve YouTube audio.
text.Instale yt-dlp para o modo YouTube/OBS B: Install yt-dlp so YouTube/OBS Browser mode can play audio in /player.
text.Modo Spotify ativo: pedidos por texto en: Spotify mode is active: text requests go to Spotify. YouTube stays idle until you change provider.
text.Modo YouTube/Pear ativo: o SRL usa YouTu: YouTube/Pear mode is active: SRL uses YouTube Data API for text search and sends playback to Pear. Pear uses the account signed in there.
text.Modo YouTube/OBS ativo: o SRL usa YouTub: YouTube/OBS mode is active: SRL uses YouTube Data API for text search and plays in the OBS Browser Source /player.
text.Preencha ao menos uma API Key para busca: Enter at least one API key for song-name search. Direct links only enter in YouTube mode.
Loading notes for the installed version.
You are already on the latest version.
text.Existem alterações pendentes. Clique em: There are pending changes. Click Save settings.
text.arquivo será criado no próximo pedido: file will be created on the next request
text.Existem alterações não salvas. Sair da c: There are unsaved changes. Leave setup without saving?
text.Baixando e aplicando atualização. O app: Downloading and applying update. The app may restart automatically.
text.Atualizacao em andamento. Pode fechar es: Update in progress. You can close this page; the app will restart and reopen when finished.
text.Atualizacao iniciada. Pode fechar esta p: Update started. You can close this page; the app will reopen.
text.Encerrar o Song Request Linux agora? Iss: Quit Song Request Linux now? This stops the bot, queue, and local player.
text.App encerrando. Esta aba pode ser fechad: App is shutting down. This tab can be closed.
text.chave(s) salva(s). Necessária para pedid: saved key(s). Required for name-based requests; direct links require YouTube mode to be active.
text.Pear respondeu na API local. Login Googl: Pear responded on the local API. Google/YouTube login stays inside Pear, not in the SRL API key.
text.Abra o Pear Desktop e confira o plugin A: Open Pear Desktop and check the API Server plugin on port 26538.
text.Playlist fallback marcada. Clique em Sal: Fallback playlist enabled. Click Save settings.
text.Playlist fallback desmarcada. Clique em: Fallback playlist disabled. Click Save settings.
text.Persistência da fila marcada. Clique em: Queue persistence enabled. Click Save settings.
text.Persistência da fila desmarcada. Clique: Queue persistence disabled. Click Save settings.

placeholders.system of a down spiders ou https://yout: system of a down spiders or https://youtu.be/...
placeholders.deixe vazio para manter a chave atual: leave empty to keep the current key
